title: symphyotrichum laeve var. geyeri
intro: Symphyotrichum laeve var. geyeri, also known as Geyer's prairie dock, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its flat, leaf-like stem and purple flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum laeve var. geyeri include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, and it has also been used in traditional herbal remedies for its purported health benefits.
